hero.headline: Turn Your CCTV Into
hero.description: Overwatch helps businesses detect intrusions, suspicious activity, and security risks in real time by using AI-driven CCTV monitoring and remote incident management.

benefits.title: 24/7 Active Monitoring
benefits.description: AI-powered surveillance with real-time threat detection

benefits.title: Instant Response
benefits.description: Under 30-second average response time to alerts

benefits.title: Proven Results
benefits.description: 98% threat detection accuracy with zero false alarms

problem.label: The Vulnerability
problem.title: Security Problems Do Not Start When the Alarm Rings

quietRisks.title: Quiet Security Risks
quietRisks.description: For logistics companies, warehouses, and retail operations, security risks often happen quietly:
items: Incidents only discovered the next morning.

passiveCost.title: The Real Cost of Passive CCTV
passiveCost.description: Passive CCTV often creates a false sense of security. You may have cameras, but that does not mean you have control. If nobody is watching at the right moment, your business may only discover the problem after:
items: A vehicle has been tampered with.
A restricted area has been accessed.
A guard has failed to report an incident.
A staff member has breached procedure.
A client is asking for answers.
passiveCost.outro: Overwatch is designed to close this gap.

problem.quote:
Traditional CCTV is useful, but only if someone is actively watching it and knows what to do when something happens. Overwatch changes this.

We combine CCTV, AI-driven detection, remote monitoring, and incident escalation to help your business move from passive surveillance to active security control.

solution.label: The Solution
solution.title: Overwatch Virtual Guard
solution.description: AI-Assisted Remote Security Monitoring for Business Sites

monitor.title: Complement & Enhance
monitor.description: Overwatch Virtual Guard is designed to complement, enhance, or reduce dependency on traditional physical guarding.

verify.title: Exception Alerts
verify.description: By integrating with your existing or new CCTV infrastructure, Overwatch uses AI-driven exception alerts to detect human movement, intrusion, and suspicious activity in defined areas.

deter.title: Remote Verification
deter.description: When an event is detected, our monitoring team verifies the situation remotely and escalates it according to your site procedures.

document.title: Smarter Monitoring
document.description: This gives your business a smarter way to monitor sites, manage incidents, and maintain visibility without relying only on on-site guards.

whyChoose.label: Why Overwatch
whyChoose.title: Why Businesses Choose Overwatch
whyChoose.description: We complement your physical security measures to provide active, intelligent site control.

guards.title: Reduce Dependence on Physical Guards
guards.description: Physical guards remain useful, but they have limitations. They can become tired, distracted, absent, intimidated, or compromised. Overwatch provides an additional layer of control by monitoring key areas remotely and generating alerts when activity is detected.

detection.title: Detect Incidents Earlier
detection.description: CCTV footage is often reviewed only after stock loss, intrusion, or damage has already happened. Overwatch helps identify incidents while they are happening, giving your business a better chance to respond quickly.

visibility.title: Improve Management Visibility
visibility.description: Owners, directors, and operations managers cannot be everywhere at once. Overwatch gives decision-makers better visibility over what is happening across their sites, especially after hours or across multiple locations.

accountability.title: Strengthen Accountability
accountability.description: When a site is monitored actively, staff and guards know that critical areas are being watched and incidents are being recorded. This improves accountability and reduces reliance on manual reporting alone.

protection.title: Protect Stock, Assets, and Operations
protection.description: For businesses with high-value inventory, vehicles, equipment, or cash flow, delayed detection can be expensive. Overwatch helps protect your operational continuity by reducing blind spots and improving incident escalation.

business.label: Business Protection
business.title: Built for Logistics, Warehouses, and Retail Operations
business.description: Protect your assets, staff, and operations with intelligent virtual guarding tailored to commercial environments.

items.title: Logistics Companies
items.description: Logistics businesses operate with constant movement: vehicles, drivers, loading teams, dispatch areas, stock, and delivery schedules.
bullets: Suspicious behaviour near vehicles or cargo
items.outro: This helps reduce operational blind spots and gives management more control over site security.

items.title: Warehouses and Storage Facilities
items.description: Warehouses are vulnerable because large spaces, stock movement, and multiple staff access points make it difficult to monitor everything manually.
bullets: Intrusion through gates, walls, or perimeter areas
Loading bay activity outside approved hours
items.outro: This supports stock protection, incident verification, and better operational discipline.

items.title: Medium and Large Retail Stores
items.description: Retail stores face a combination of internal and external risks, including shoplifting, staff misconduct, after-hours access, and stock room losses.
items.outro: This gives store owners and managers better visibility without needing to be physically present at all times.

items.title: Distribution Centres
items.description: Distribution centres are high-movement environments where delays, access breaches, and stock loss can quickly affect the wider business.
items.outro: This improves control over both security and site discipline.

steps.title: Site Assessment
steps.description: We evaluate your existing camera infrastructure, coverage gaps, and security requirements — free of charge.

steps.title: System Integration
steps.description: Our team connects your compatible cameras to the Overwatch platform with minimal hardware additions.

steps.title: AI Calibration
steps.description: We configure detection zones, sensitivity levels, and escalation protocols tailored to your site.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.description: 24/7 monitoring begins from our operations center. You're protected within days, not months.

whyNow.title: Your Business Cannot Afford to Wait Until After the Incident
whyNow.description:
Security threats are not only external. Many losses happen because of poor visibility, weak procedures, delayed response, or lack of accountability.

For businesses handling stock, vehicles, equipment, deliveries, and cash, one serious incident can cost more than months of active monitoring.

Overwatch gives your business a practical way to reduce that risk.

homes.label: For Homes
homes.title: Peace of Mind for Your Family
homes.description: Protect what matters most with intelligent monitoring designed for private residences — whether you're home or away.

family.title: Family Safety
family.description: Monitor children playing, verify visitors at the gate, and ensure household staff activity aligns with your expectations.

perimeter.title: Perimeter Protection
perimeter.description: AI-powered fence line and boundary detection alerts you to intrusions before anyone reaches your home.

pool.title: Pool & Outdoor Areas
pool.description: Dedicated monitoring for pools, gardens, and outdoor spaces — especially critical when children are present.

overnight.title: Overnight Monitoring
overnight.description: Sleep soundly knowing trained operators are watching your property through the night, ready to deter and escalate.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: How Overwatch Works
howItWorks.description: From Assessment to Active Protection in Days

flow.title: We Assess Your Site
flow.description: We review your existing CCTV system, site layout, vulnerable areas, access points, operating hours, and current security procedures. This allows us to identify where Overwatch can add the most value.

flow.title: We Define Detection Zones
flow.description:
Together, we define critical areas such as: perimeters, entrances and exits, loading bays, stock rooms, warehouse aisles, restricted areas, vehicle access points, cash handling areas, high-value storage zones, and after-hours movement areas.

The system is configured to focus on the areas that matter most to your business.

flow.title: AI Detects Exceptions
flow.description:
Instead of relying only on someone watching multiple screens, the system generates alerts when specific activity is detected. Examples include:

• Human detection after hours
• Intrusion into restricted zones
• Movement in no-access areas
• Activity at loading bays outside approved times
• Unexpected presence near stock or assets
• Perimeter movement
• Potential operational breaches

flow.title: Our Team Verifies the Incident
flow.description: Alerts are reviewed by the Overwatch monitoring team to reduce unnecessary escalation and confirm whether the event requires action. This helps avoid relying only on raw camera footage or delayed reporting.

flow.title: We Escalate According to Your Protocol
flow.description:
Once verified, incidents are escalated to the right contact or response team. Escalation can include:

• Client focal point notification
• Site manager notification
• Security supervisor notification
• Physical guard instruction
• Incident logging and follow-up reporting

pricing.label: Service Tiers
pricing.title: Managed Monitoring Plans
pricing.description: All tiers include AI-enhanced detection, operator verification, escalation workflows, and 3 months cloud storage. 12-month operational contract. Prices exclude VAT.

setup.label: Once-off setup:
setup.value: 2,500 MZN installation fee & 4,000 MZN hardware deposit.

rows.overwatch: Incidents can be escalated while active

guardingAngle.title: Not Just Another CCTV System
guardingAngle.subtitle: Overwatch is not simply CCTV installation. It is a virtual guarding solution designed to support real security operations.
guardingAngle.toText: "Did we detect it, verify it, and respond properly?"
guardingAngle.outro: This is the difference between passive surveillance and active security management.

certification.text: The underlying OverWatch Technologies platform is certified to international standards including ISO 9001, ISO 22301, ISO 27001, and ISO 27701, ensuring that our operational methodology meets global compliance benchmarks for security and data integrity.

items.quote: Overwatch transformed our warehouse security. We went from reviewing footage after break-ins to stopping intruders in real time. The ROI was immediate.
items.author: Operations Director

items.quote: Having 24/7 monitoring on our residential compound gives our residents genuine peace of mind. The weekly reports keep our management fully informed.
items.author: Estate Manager

items.quote: The integration with our existing cameras was seamless. Within three days we had active AI monitoring — something our previous provider couldn't offer.
items.author: Facility Manager

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Overwatch virtual guarding and remote monitoring.

items.question: Do we need to replace our existing CCTV system?
items.answer: Not always. Overwatch can work with compatible existing CCTV infrastructure. During the assessment, we review your current system and confirm what can be used.

items.question: Does Overwatch replace physical guards?
items.answer: Overwatch can complement, enhance, or in some cases reduce the need for physical guards. The right model depends on your site, risk profile, operating hours, and response requirements.

items.question: What happens when the system detects movement?
items.answer: An alert is generated and reviewed by the monitoring team. If the event requires action, it is escalated according to your agreed protocol.

items.question: Can Overwatch monitor more than one site?
items.answer: Yes. Overwatch is suitable for businesses with multiple branches, warehouses, yards, stores, or operational sites.

items.question: Is this only for after-hours monitoring?
items.answer: No. Overwatch operates 24/7. Overwatch can be used for after-hours monitoring, operational oversight, restricted area monitoring, guard supervision, and incident detection during defined time periods.

items.question: Can Overwatch help reduce stock loss?
items.answer: Overwatch helps improve visibility, accountability, and incident detection around stock areas. This can support loss prevention, but it should be combined with strong internal procedures and access control.

contact.label: Security Assessment
contact.title: Book a Free Security Assessment
contact.description:
Every site is different. Before recommending a solution, we assess your current CCTV system, site layout, risk areas, and operating procedures.

This allows us to identify:
• Where your current security gaps are
• Which cameras can be used
• Which areas require better coverage
• Where AI detection should be applied
• How incidents should be escalated
• Whether your existing guarding model can be improved

Book your free security assessment today.
